dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'tall white candle bursts out of congestion area' as: large body (body > atr_14) with price breaking above upper Bollinger Band. Entry at congestion breakout approximated as price > sma_50 (support level). Volume condition from source text (breakout above 50-day MA performs better) mapped to sma_50 requirement. Exit when price closes back below sma_50. Exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT so reversal logic applied. Bear market applicability noted but pattern marked for both regimes per target_regime specification.

source_rule_text: 13 New Price Lines pattern: A tall white candle bursts out of a congestion area, triggering a buy order at the top of the congestion zone
